# HeartOff

## Tags
unlike, dislike, hate, emotion

## Categories
social, multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/heart-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HeartOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HeartOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
